markdown:
**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 170 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- A sheen of red crosses the surface of this star-shaped goldstone medallion when the light hits it. The affixed armor or weapon is warm to the touch. The spell attack roll of any spell cast by Activating this item is +7, and the spell DC is 17.
  • **Armor** You gain resistance 2 to fire.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a [fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=72) spell by Activating the _star_, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional 1d4 fire damage until the end of your next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_produce flame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=236). Flaming Star **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 170 **Price** 55 gp Flaming Star (Greater) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 170 **Price** 425 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 5, extra damage when affixed to a weapon is 1d6, the spell attack roll is +14, and the spell DC is 24. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_fireball_](/Spells.aspx?ID=119). Flaming Star (Major) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 170 **Price** 1,750 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 10, extra damage when affixed to a weapon is 1d8, the spell attack roll is +19, and the spell DC is 29. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-level [_fireball_](/Spells.aspx?ID=119). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_wall of fire_](/Spells.aspx?ID=362).
name: Flaming Star

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 _[**PFS Note**](/pathfinder-society) Remove the word "necromancy" from the grim sandglass._ **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- One bulb of this tiny hourglass contains black sand, the other white. After even a few grains pass from one side to the other, it reverses its flow to keep the two sides in equilibrium. The spell DC of any spell cast by Activating this item is 17.
  • **Armor** You gain resistance 2 to [negative](/Traits.aspx?ID=118).
  • **Weapon** After you cast a [necromancy](/Traits.aspx?ID=117) spell by Activating the _sandglass_, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional 1d4 negative damage until the end of your next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_chill touch_](/Spells.aspx?ID=35). Grim Sandglass **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 55 gp Grim Sandglass (Greater) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 450 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 5, extra damage when affixed to a weapon is 1d6, and the spell DC is 24. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 2nd-level [_harm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=146) or [_heal_](/Spells.aspx?ID=148). Grim Sandglass (Major) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 2,000 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 10, extra damage when affixed to a weapon is 1d8, and the spell DC is 29. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-level _harm_ or _heal_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_enervation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=687) or 4th-level [_restoration_](/Spells.aspx?ID=258).
name: Grim Sandglass

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- Intense blue water magically holds its shape—a perfect sphere. The spell DC of any spell cast by Activating this item is 17.
  • **Armor** You gain resistance 2 to [water](/Traits.aspx?ID=165) effects and attacks by water creatures.
  • **Weapon** After you cast a water spell by Activating the _droplet_, your body becomes mistlike. Until the end of the turn, you can move through enemies' spaces, treating each square in their spaces as difficult terrain. You can't move through creatures that have the [water](/Traits.aspx?ID=165) trait in this way.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_spout_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1002). Perfect Droplet **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 55 gp Perfect Droplet (Greater) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 450 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 5, enemies' spaces aren't difficult terrain when mistlike, and spell DC is 24. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_aqueous orb_](/Spells.aspx?ID=669) or [_feet to fins_](/Spells.aspx?ID=113). Perfect Droplet (Major) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 1,800 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 10, enemies' spaces aren't difficult terrain when mistlike, and the spell DC is 29. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-level _aqueous orb_ or _feet to fins_. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_hydraulic torrent_](/Spells.aspx?ID=155).
name: Perfect Droplet

markdown:
**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Usage** affixed to armor or a weapon --- The crystal chamber within this split geode is divided into three lobes of equal size. The spell DC of any spell cast by Activating this item is 17.
  • **Armor** After you cast an [earth](/Traits.aspx?ID=55) spell by Activating the _geode_, you gain resistance 1 to physical damage (except [adamantine](/Equipment.aspx?ID=374)) until the end of your next turn, or double the resistance for a non-cantrip spell.
  • **Weapon** After you cast an earth spell by Activating the _geode_, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional 1d4 bludgeoning damage until the end of your next turn.
**Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You cast [_scatter scree_](/Spells.aspx?ID=990). Trinity Geode **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 60 gp Trinity Geode (Greater) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 460 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 3, extra damage affixed to a weapon is 1d6, and spell DC is 24. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_meld into stone_](/Spells.aspx?ID=188). Trinity Geode (Major) **Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 171 **Price** 1,900 gp --- Resistance when affixed to armor is 5, extra damage when affixed to a weapon is 1d8, and spell DC is 29. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast 4th-level [_meld into stone_](/Spells.aspx?ID=188). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** You cast [_spike stones_](/Spells.aspx?ID=717).
name: Trinity Geode

markdown:
<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 6+"
    pfs="Standard"
>
[Binding Coil](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1018)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Consumable" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=36" />
<trait label="Magical" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=103" />
<trait label="Talisman" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=155" />
<trait label="Transmutation" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=157" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** affixed to a weapon

</row>

<row gap="medium">
<row gap="tiny"><row>**Activate**</row><actions string="Free Action" /><row>envision</row></row>

 

**Trigger** Your Strike with the affixed weapon damages a creature

**Requirement** You're an expert in [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3).
</row>

</column>

---

This talisman, a bright red coil that's warm to the touch and faintly resembles a serpent, wraps entirely around your weapon. When you activate this talisman's effect, attempt to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=35) the creature you hit. On a success, rather than the normal Grapple effects, the coil instead wraps itself around the target with one end remaining attached to your weapon. Your opponent must succeed at a DC 20 [Escape](/Actions.aspx?ID=79) check to break free. The coil breaks if you move any further away from the bound opponent, but not if you move any closer.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>

<title
level="2"
right="Item 6"
pfs="Standard"
>
Binding Coil
</title>

<traits>

</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

**Price** 50 gp

<row gap="medium">

</row>

</column>

<title
level="2"
right="Item 13"
pfs="Standard"
>
Binding Coil (Greater)
</title>

<traits>

</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

**Price** 450 gp

<row gap="medium">

</row>

</column>

---

The escape DC is 30.
name: Binding Coil

<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 6+"
    pfs="Standard"
>
[Binding Coil](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1018)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Consumable" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=36" />
<trait label="Magical" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=103" />
<trait label="Talisman" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=155" />
<trait label="Transmutation" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=157" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** affixed to a weapon

</row>

<row gap="medium">
<row gap="tiny"><row>**Activate**</row><actions string="Free Action" /><row>envision</row></row>

 

**Trigger** Your Strike with the affixed weapon damages a creature

**Requirement** You're an expert in [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3).
</row>

</column>

---

This talisman, a bright red coil that's warm to the touch and faintly resembles a serpent, wraps entirely around your weapon. When you activate this talisman's effect, attempt to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=35) the creature you hit. On a success, rather than the normal Grapple effects, the coil instead wraps itself around the target with one end remaining attached to your weapon. Your opponent must succeed at a DC 20 [Escape](/Actions.aspx?ID=79) check to break free. The coil breaks if you move any further away from the bound opponent, but not if you move any closer.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>

<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 6"
    pfs="Standard"
>
[Dispersing Bullet](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1019)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Consumable" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=36" />
<trait label="Evocation" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=65" />
<trait label="Magical" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=103" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

**Price** 50 gp

<row gap="medium">
**Ammunition** [sling bullet](/Weapons.aspx?ID=72)

</row>

<row gap="medium">
<row gap="tiny"><row>**Activate**</row><actions string="Single Action" /><row>Interact</row></row>

 

 

 
</row>

</column>

---

The metals used to forge this lead shot were taken from a variety of continents and barely stay together. When an activated _dispersing bullet_ hits a target, the bullet scatters into a sphere of metal shards as the metals try to return to their places of origin. All creatures in a 10-foot emanation around the target of the attack (and not including the target) must succeed at a DC 21 Fortitude save or be [pushed](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) 10 feet from the target (15 feet on a critical failure).

<column gap="tiny">

</column>
name: Dispersing Bullet

    right="Item 4"
    pfs="Standard"
>
[Dragonbone Arrowhead](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1020)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Consumable" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=36" />
<trait label="Evocation" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=65" />
<trait label="Magical" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=103" />
<trait label="Talisman" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=155" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

**Price** 20 gp

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** affixed to a melee weapon or a ranged weapon with the  thrown  trait

</row>

<row gap="medium">
<row gap="tiny"><row>**Activate**</row><actions string="Single Action" /><row>Interact</row></row>

 

 

**Requirement** You're an expert with the affixed weapon.
</row>

</column>

---

This arrowhead, carved from [dragon](/Traits.aspx?ID=50) bone, hangs off the shaft of your weapon. When you activate this talisman, until the end of the current turn, the affixed weapon gains the thrown 20 feet weapon trait, and when you make a thrown Strike with it, it flies back to your hand after the Strike completes. If your hands are full when the weapon returns, it falls to the ground in your space.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>
name: Dragonbone Arrowhead
requirement_markdown: You're an expert with the affixed weapon.

<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 5"
    pfs="Standard"
>
[Eye of Enlightenment](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1021)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Consumable" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=36" />
<trait label="Divination" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=47" />
<trait label="Magical" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=103" />
<trait label="Talisman" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=155" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

**Price** 25 gp

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** affixed to a weapon

</row>

<row gap="medium">
<row gap="tiny"><row>**Activate**</row><actions string="Free Action" /><row>envision</row></row>

 

**Trigger** You succeed at a Strike with the affixed weapon

**Requirement** You're an expert in [Arcana](/Skills.aspx?ID=2), [Occult](/Skills.aspx?ID=11), [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=10), [Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=13), [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14), or a [Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=8) skill.
</row>

</column>

---

This dried eye was plucked from a magical creature. You combine your observation about your enemy's reaction to your Strike with the stores of magical wisdom within the talisman to try to glean more information about the foe's true nature. When you activate this talisman, you attempt to [Recall Knowledge](/Actions.aspx?ID=26) about the creature you hit. If you roll a critical failure, you get a failure instead.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>
name: Eye of Enlightenment

<title
    level="1"
    right="Item 9"
    pfs="Limited"
>
[Ghostly Portal Paint](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1022)
</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Uncommon" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=159" />
<trait label="Consumable" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=36" />
<trait label="Magical" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=103" />
<trait label="Oil" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=121" />
<trait label="Transmutation" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=157" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 173

**Price** 120 gp

<row gap="medium">

**Usage** held in 2 hands

**Bulk** L
</row>

<row gap="medium">
<row gap="tiny"><row>**Activate**</row><actions string="Three Actions" /><row>Interact</row></row>

 

 

 
</row>

</column>

---

Translucent and nearly weightless, this opalescent paint seems to resolve into occult symbols if stared at too long. When used to cover a 5-foot-wide, 10-foot-tall section of a wall, the paint turns that section of wall ghostly and [incorporeal](/Traits.aspx?ID=222) to a depth of 10 feet, allowing corporeal creatures and objects to pass through it. The portal persists for 10 minutes. When this effect wears off, anything remaining within the portal is shunted to the nearest exit.

 [Force](/Traits.aspx?ID=75) effects, other incorporeal objects and creatures, and [_ghost touch_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=297) weapons can't cross through the wall, as is normal for incorporeality. An incorporeal creature that's inside the wall when the paint is used is shunted to the nearest exit.

<column gap="tiny">

</column>
name: Ghostly Portal Paint
